category_title: Children who exhibit aggressive interpersonal behaviors
scenario_title: Non-participation and disruption during group teaching lessons
minimal_context: The student is expected to join their classmates in a circle on the rug for a group teaching lesson.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time for our group teaching lesson. Everyone needs to sit in the circle on the rug.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Stands at the edge of the room, not participating in the group activity and showing a lack of attention.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please come over here and join the class activity.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Leaves the area without permission and starts running aimlessly around the classroom, disturbing the group activity.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Stop running. You need to follow the rules and sit next to your classmates.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: No! (Runs into the circle, pushes another child, and displays resistance by refusing to stop the aggressive behavior.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time for our group teaching lesson. Everyone needs to sit in the circle on the rug.

STUDENT: (Stands at the edge of the room, not participating in the group activity and showing a lack of attention.)

TUTOR: Please come over here and join the class activity.

STUDENT: (Leaves the area without permission and starts running aimlessly around the classroom, disturbing the group activity.)

TUTOR: Stop running. You need to follow the rules and sit next to your classmates.

STUDENT: No! (Runs into the circle, pushes another child, and displays resistance by refusing to stop the aggressive behavior.)
